channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: iOS 26.5 will add end-to-end encryption for RCS messages between Apple and Android
item.description: Keep those private conversations truly private.

item.title: 7 Best Smart Locks (2026) for Front Doors, Side Doors, and Even Garages
item.description: Upgrade your locks with fingerprint-scanning or a keypad, whether it’s at the front door or a sliding glass entryway.

item.title: A viral influencer wants to buy Spirit Airlines and run it like the Green Bay Packers. Could it work?
item.description: Hunter Peterson wants to turn Spirit into the airline ‘for the people.’ The internet’s response proves how dire air travel has become. Since he was seven years old, voice actor and influencer Hunter Peterson has told people that his biggest dream was to start and run an airline. In the wake of Spirit Airlines’ recent shutdown, he believes his golden opportunity has arrived at last—and the internet appears to agree....

item.title: While billionaires get ready for the Met Gala, their workers walk a different kind of runway
item.description: Fashion’s biggest night, funded by Jeff Bezos, has a counter-show—and the models are Amazon workers. Hours before Jeff Bezos and Lauren Sánchez Bezos take their places as sponsors and honorary chairs of the Met Gala—fashion’s glittery annual fundraiser in support of the Metropolitan Museum of Art’s Costume Institute—a different kind of fashion event was unfolding across town....

item.title: Microsoft takes Agent 365 out of preview as shadow AI becomes an enterprise threat
item.description: Microsoft last week took Agent 365, its management platform for AI agents, out of preview and into general availability — a move that signals the software giant believes the governance challenge around autonomous AI is no longer theoretical but operational and urgent.The product, first announced at Microsoft's Ignite conference in November, positions itself as a unified control plane that lets enterprise IT and security teams observe, govern, and secure AI agents wherever they run: inside Microsoft's own ecosystem, on third-party cloud platforms like AWS Bedrock and Google Cloud, on employee e...

item.title: The RAG era is ending for agentic AI — a new compilation-stage knowledge layer is what comes next
item.description: The vector database category is undergoing a shift in response to the needs of agentic AI. The retrieval-augmented generation (RAG)-to-vector database pipeline doesn't cut it anymore; agentic AI requires a different approach that incorporates context. VentureBeat's Q1 2026 Pulse survey underscores this trend: Every standalone vector database is losing adoption share, while hybrid retrieval intent has tripled to 33.3%, the fastest-growing strategic position in the dataset.Vector database pioneer Pinecone recognizes this and is pivoting to meet the specific needs of agentic AI.The company today ...

item.title: Image AI models now drive app growth, beating chatbot upgrades
item.description: Appfigures finds visual model launches generate 6.5x more downloads — but most don’t convert that spike into revenue.

item.title: Katie Haun raises $1B for new venture funds
item.description: Katie Haun announced on Monday that $1 billion has been raised across new funds to continue the firm’s thesis of backing crypto and blockchain startups.

item.title: 'Flaws identified in the B-21 configuration': Chinese scientists claim their mysterious PADJ-X stealth design software exposed major weaknesses in the USAF’s B-21 Raider program using digital twins
item.description: A Chinese simulation tool modeled the B-21 using public data, claiming aerodynamic gains while raising questions about accuracy and intent.

item.title: Gen Z hate AI? The Musk vs Altman trial heats up, OpenAI phone rumors buzz and more of the week’s most surprising developments
item.description: This week, AI is all about Elon Musk's ongoing feud with OpenAI's CEO Sam Altman.

item.title: Wholesome Direct returns June 6 with a slew of joyful games
item.description: Catch the stream the day after Summer Game Fest's 2026 showcase.

item.title: SwitchBot’s rechargeable button pusher is on sale for over 20 percent off
item.description: If you want to give mom something that helps lighten the load, the SwitchBot Bot Rechargeable makes for a great, inexpensive gift. And now through May 10th, you can buy it for around $26.99 ($7 off) from Amazon and SwitchBot (with code FORHER20) as a part of its ongoing Mother’s Day sale, which drops the […]

item.title: MacBook Pro M4 vs iMac M4: which Mac is best for you?
item.description: Refer to these as "budget Macs," but remember they are still very powerful machines.

item.title: The Jeff Bezos and Lauren Sánchez Met Gala is dressed up in controversy and protests
item.description: The swanky NYC affair has long had its detractors, but critics of extreme wealth are turning up the volume this year in honor of the Amazon power couple. Fashion’s biggest night out returns to New York City tonight as the Metropolitan Museum of Art prepares to welcome couture-wearing celebrities back to its steps.

item.title: I searched the galaxy for the best Star Wars Day 2026 deals — these are the Lego sets, Funko Pops, apparel, and collectibles worth buying
item.description: Star Wars Day 2026 is packed with new drops and big discounts, and I’ve rounded up the best deals and collectibles worth grabbing right now.

item.title: One of iRobot's co-founders is now making weird little robot companions
item.description: They are like pets, but without all of that pesky love.

item.title: I couldn't believe how easy it was to get my first online shop up and running thanks to Prestashop
item.description: You can get a Prestashop online in just a few minutes, especially if you're a Hostinger customer. Here's how.
